case_metadata.title: Authentication, AD, and Lateral Movement
case_metadata.scenario_class: The 'WHO' investigation — stolen cred + AD attack chain
case_metadata.ground_truth_provenance: Authored alongside the bundled SECURITY.evtx events, Kerberos TGS/TGT records, and Linux auth.log; the attack timeline is encoded deterministically.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Linux SSH brute force from 203.0.113.42 (10 failed attempts across multiple accounts)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: 10 failed SSH attempts (admin/root/test/postgres + 2x analyst) followed by publickey accept = brute-force survivor pattern.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Post-foothold sudo to root with /etc/shadow access + curl|bash
ground_truth_findings.rationale: sudo cat /etc/shadow + remote payload pipe to shell = post-compromise priv-esc. Secondary evidence: linux/bash_history.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Windows SMB brute force from same 203.0.113.42 (type-3 logons, NTLM)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: 4 failed type-3 logons followed by success — credential reuse from Linux compromise.

ground_truth_findings.claim: RDP (logon type 10) connection from external 203.0.113.42 to WKS-ANALYST
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Type-10 RDP from internet IP after SMB foothold = hands-on lateral.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Kerberoasting — 3 TGS requests with RC4 encryption (MSSQL/SQL01, HTTP/exchange, LDAP/DC01)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: RC4 encryption on TGS requests = classic Kerberoasting signature targeting SPN-bearing accounts.

ground_truth_findings.claim: AS-REP roasting — TGT request for user 'alice' with no preauth
ground_truth_findings.rationale: TGT requested with DONT_REQ_PREAUTH flag = AS-REP roastable account targeted.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Remote-admin tooling — psexec to DC01, wmiexec to SQL01
ground_truth_findings.rationale: psexec + wmiexec command lines visible in process tree = remote command execution on DC and SQL hosts.
Type-10 RDP at 02:17 from different external IP = attacker returning via persistence mechanism.
